Who will turn up going into
item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 48min Kane vs Mbappe — UCL stats this season vs last time out…
Who will turn up going into tonight’s QF second-leg? 1 1 mil

William Hill @WilliamHill · 1h Arsenal take a one-goal advantage into their second leg against Sporting.
@NicoleHolliday has picked out a Bet Builder on the match.
Impact Sub and Bet Builder Winnings Boost apply.
18+ | GambleAware De williamhill.com 1 mil

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 1h Eve Johnson Houghton is excited to embark on a Classic campaign with Zavateri, and hopes he
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 1h Eve Johnson Houghton is excited to embark on a Classic campaign with Zavateri, and hopes he can continue climbing the ladder as he makes his seasonal reappearance at Newbury on Saturday
Read with Racing Post+ De racingpost.com 1 2 1 mil
